embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

raw_data.content:
Welcome and Congratulations on getting promoted to the Wave <@&1041582116963614781> Team! Here's some quick pointers you should be aware of:
- You should stay active (If you can't staff/support due to being on holidays make sure to dm me)
- Know how to handle head situations (Head proof, Head map request, etc)
- Show good leadership skills
- Manage all your duties / tasks well (if you ever want more duties feel free to dm me)
- Follow everything in <#1484542781451145216>  &  <#1484542877609758721> 
- Admins can purge when bot is down ``Purge 500``

Here's a handbook dedicated for the Admin Team: [Wave Admin Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1wjy63j-9GHg3m7bwDRKTwDSvcTg_-vStp0f9rZYFYpM/edit?usp=sharing>)

**Please completely familiarize yourself with everything above, and good luck on getting promoted to the next part of Wave!**
